title: Birth of the Blues
writer: Harry Tugend, Walter DeLeon, Erwin Gelsey
actors: Bing Crosby, Mary Martin, Brian Donlevy
plot: Jeff grows up near Basin Street in New Orleans, playing his clarinet with the dock workers. He puts together a band, the Basin Street Hot-Shots, which includes a cornet player, Memphis. They struggle to get their jazz music accept...
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 1 win & 1 nomination total
